hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.rs) cargo check --workspace --exclude vibe-collab 2>&1 | tail -8 ;; *.tsx|*.ts) npx --prefix vibecoder tsc --noEmit --project vibecoder/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | tail -5 ;; esac
test -f .vibecli/codegraph.db && echo 'kodegraph code graph present — consider /graph/report, /graph/query, or /graph/status before broad file sweeps (token-reduction substrate)' || true
